message:
fix(codegen): Improve exception handling and __new__ method generation

- Fix __new__ method codegen to skip generating separate method when
  init() is already generated from __new__ body
- Detect instance variable name (obj, self) from super().__new__() call
- Fix field assignments to use detected instance var name
- Export pyStr from runtime.zig for error message formatting
- Fix genRaiseMessage to pass allocator to runtime.pyStr
- Fix findWrittenVarsInStmts to detect exception names in handlers
- Analyze try block handlers, else_body, finalbody for variable writes
- Fix sequential try blocks to properly share hoisted exception variables
- Fix variable_usage.zig to handle obj.field assignments in __new__

These fixes allow test_exception_variations.py to pass all 90 tests.
Remaining issues in test_exception_group.py and test_except_star.py
are related to unused parameters and missing builtins.
